heading: Omitted
label: 61h–3 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 61h–3, , , , authorized Senate Majority and Minority Leaders to appoint and fix compensation of an executive secretary and a clerical assistant effective . Positions established by Legislative Branch Appropriation Act, 1970, for Offices of Senate Majority and Minority Leaders, which Act, , , , classified to former , authorized the respective leaders to appoint an executive secretary, and a clerical assistant, were abolished, see , , , set out as a note under former .
